evidence.q1: Sections are numbered 1 through 18 sequentially; cross-reference 'Section 16 does not apply to claims under Section 13 or Section 14' resolves correctly.
evidence.q2: 'Customer Data' is defined in Section 2 and used consistently thereafter; no duplicate definitions or inconsistent usage.
evidence.q3: All time phrases are specific and commercial: 'within 72 hours', 'thirty days', 'forty-five days', 'no more than one year'. No 'reasonable while' or similar.
evidence.q4: Contract uses modern commercial language; no archaic terms like 'heretofore', 'whereas', 'witnesseth' appear.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically intact and non-contradictory; e.g., 'Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours after discovering a Security Incident.' is coherent.
evidence.q6: Register is uniform: consistent use of 'will', defined-term capitalization, and similar clause structure across all sections.
